name: Dashi Delights Cat Treats – Seafood Variety 70g
description: Give your cat a gourmet experience with Dashi Delights Cat Seafood Variety Pack , featuring a selection of umami-rich, hydrating cat food toppers . Made with high-quality farm-raised chicken and natural seafood , including tuna, scallop, and bonito flakes, these toppers are crafted to enhance flavor, aroma, and hydration in every meal. Each single-serve topper is grain-free, preservative-free, carrageenan-free, and free from artificial colors , ensuring a wholesome treat suitable for cats of all breeds and life stages. Enriched with Vitamin E to support immune health and Green Tea Extract as a natural antioxidant, Dashi Delights delivers a nourishing, flavorful boost to your cat’s bowl. Variety Pack Includes: Chicken with Scallop Recipe Chicken with Tuna Recipe Chicken with Bonito Flakes Recipe These toppers are perfect for handfeeding, as meal enhancers, or for interactive feeding moments. Keep mealtime exciting and hydrating while providing your cat with a healthy, flavorful experience. Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat or meal complement. Not intended as a complete meal. Provide fresh, clean water daily. Consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve promptly. Ingredients Chicken with Scallop: Chicken, Scallop, Tapioca Starch, Natural Flavors, Guar Gum, Scallop Extract, Bonito Flakes, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract Chicken with Tuna: Chicken, Tuna, Tapioca Starch, Natural Flavors, Guar Gum, Scallop Extract, Bonito Flakes, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract Chicken & Bonito Flakes: Chicken, Bonito Flakes, Tapioca Starch, Natural Flavors, Guar Gum, Scallop Extract, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract Calorie Content & Analysis Crude Protein (min): 11.00% Crude Fat (min): 0.50% Crude Fiber (max): 0.10% Moisture (max): 88.00% Vitamin E (min): 50 IU/kg 500 kcal/kg, 35 kcal per cup (ME)
